studyName: Characterization of a Metastatic Cervical Cancer Using NGS

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line, and primary tumor location of participants with cervical squamous carcinoma and involved in the "Characterization of a Metastatic Cervical Cancer Patient and HPV18 Integration Using Next Generation Sequencing" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

tables.description: Subject ID, age, sex, and race of participants with cervical squamous carcinoma and involved in the "Characterization of a Metastatic Cervical Cancer Patient and HPV18 Integration Using Next Generation Sequencing" project.

Subject ID, consent group, and research type of participants with cervical squamous carcinoma and involved in the "Characterization of a Metastatic Cervical Cancer Patient and HPV18 Integration Using Next Generation Sequencing" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: RESEARCH_TYPE
variables.description: Type of research subject data was used for

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, sample use variable obtained from participants with cervical squamous carcinoma and involved in the "Characterization of a Metastatic Cervical Cancer Patient and HPV18 Integration Using Next Generation Sequencing" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use. Seq_DNA_SNP: SNP genotypes derived from sequence data; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing; Seq_DNA_WholeGenome: Whole genome sequencing; Seq_RNA: Whole transcriptome sequencing
